items.title: Three men arrested in UK on suspicion of spying for China
items.description: He is one of three unnamed men who the Met Police suspect of assisting Chinese intelligence services in the UK.

items.title: Greek court upholds criminal organisation verdict on neo-Nazi Golden Dawn
items.description: The party's founder Nikos Mihaloliakos and other officials are again found guilty, almost six years after an original trial.

items.title: Key takeaways from Texas primaries, as Talarico beats Crockett in Democratic race
items.description: Contests in the southern state are signalling which way the Republicans and Democrats are heading.

items.title: South Africa's long-serving former defence minister and former Robben Island prisoner dies
items.description: Mosiuoa Lekota was imprisoned with former South African President Nelson Mandela on Robben Island.

items.title: Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?
items.description: Iran continues retaliatory strikes against Israel and across the Gulf, as US and Israeli attacks on Iran enter a fifth day.
